response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid software engineering experience but lacks the core C++ specialization required for this role. Their C/C++ work was limited to a 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015, with no recent C++ experience. The role requires deep C++/STL expertise, industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443), MQTT, message brokers, and industrial automation protocols — none of which appear in the candidate's recent profile, which is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/GIS work.
strengths: Extensive 15+ year software engineering background with senior/staff-level roles
Strong testing culture (TDD, workshops, fluent-asserts library) aligned with quality mindset
Experience with distributed/event-driven systems and high-throughput services at Sociomantic
concerns: No substantial or recent C++ experience — only ~6 months at NI a decade ago
No exposure to industrial automation, IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, MQTT)
Career trajectory focused on web/full-stack (TS/Node/DLang), not systems-level C++ development

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering seniority and craftsmanship
